name: Potatoes with Ginger and Garlic
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 ounces ginger root, peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the potatoes in their jackets until tender. Drain and allow to completely cool.
- This can be done the night before.
2. Peel and cut the cooled potatoes into 1-inch cubes.
3. In a blender or food processor, combine the ginger, garlic, turmeric, water, salt (if used), and cayenne pepper.
- Blend until smooth.
4. Heat the oil in a large non-stick or cast-iron pan over medium heat.
5. Add the fennel seeds to the hot oil and fry for a few seconds.
6. Pour in the spice paste and stir gently.
- Be careful as it may spatter.
7. Continue stirring until the mixture thickens slightly.
8. Add the potato cubes to the pan and fry, stirring continuously over medium-high heat for 5-7 minutes or until the potatoes have a golden-brown crust.
